name: I C Bus LLC
owner_or_parent: Navistar International (now part of Traton/Volkswagen Group)
principals: Walter Borst (Navistar CFO, listed as 'Manager' in source data)
districts_or_customers: N/A - sells buses to dealers, districts, and contractors nationally
recent_news: Conway, AR plant ceased bus assembly Jan 2010 (~477 jobs lost); all IC Bus assembly consolidated to Navistar Tulsa, OK plant. Conway property acquired by DBG Canada in 2017. Navistar acquired by Traton (VW) in 2021.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT - misclassification in source list. IC Bus is a school bus OEM (Navistar/Traton subsidiary), not an operating school transportation contractor. Walter Borst is Navistar's CFO. The Conway, AR address is a legacy manufacturing site (closed 2010, sold 2017). Should be removed from target universe.

name: Harlow's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Multiple MT districts via Kalispell, Libby, Boulder, Manhattan, Missoula, Noxon locations; also ND, SD, ID, WA districts
recent_news: No recent M&A signals found. Continues to expand multi-state footprint via the goharlows.com bus/truck dealer affiliate; operates ~30 locations across 5 states (ND, SD, MT, ID, WA). Contracts range from 6 to 100+ routes per location.
fit_notes: Attractive multi-state family-owned platform with 50+ years of operating history, ~30 locations, sister bus/truck dealership (Harlow's Bus & Truck Sales). The Kalispell branch is one piece of a much larger ND-headquartered enterprise; a true tuck-in target would be the whole Harlow's organization, not just this single MT location. Founder is 80s+ (succession-relevant) but three sons are deeply involved -- transition planning may be a multi-year window. Likely too large/diversified for a small tuck-in; better fit as a platform-scale acquisition.

name: Hamburg School Car Svc
principals: Mark Snyder (listed as Manager in source data)
districts_or_customers: Likely Hamburg Central School District and/or Lancaster Central School District (WNY/Erie County); not confirmed -- Hamburg CSD's primary contracted provider is Fisher Bus Service
recent_news: No news, M&A, or litigation surfaced. Operating address per Yelp/listings is 3080 Amsdell Rd, Hamburg, NY 14075 (Erie County) -- not the 27 Wilma Dr, Lancaster address in source data; phone (716) 649-8048 matches. Very low public footprint (no website, minimal directory presence).
fit_notes: Small WNY Erie County operator; in-state for Summit's NY footprint and likely modest fleet (~10-25 buses based on 63 employees). Lack of website and very thin public presence is typical of subscale family operators -- potentially a clean tuck-in but ownership, contract base, and even district relationships need primary diligence (direct outreach to Mark Snyder). Low strategic priority until confirmed as a true contracted operator vs. ancillary car/van service to Hamburg-area schools.

name: Northland Transportation
districts_or_customers: Schenectady City School District (one of multiple contracted vendors)
recent_news: No M&A, growth, or litigation news surfaced. Continues to operate at 54 Freemans Bridge Rd, Schenectady (Scotia border), as one of the Schenectady CSD's contracted bus vendors. Note: the FMCSA 'Northland Transportation Inc' (USDOT 204050) in Laurel, NE is a different entity -- chemical hauler, unrelated.
fit_notes: Classic small NY Capital Region tuck-in profile: ~35+ years old, owner-operator (Bardine), low public profile, no website, contracted to a named district (Schenectady CSD). Size (~50 employees, est. ~20-30 buses) fits a bolt-on rather than a platform deal. In Summit's NY footprint; succession-likely given founding date and sole-owner structure. Worth direct outreach -- recommended prioritization.

name: Allegiance Transportation LLC
principals: Thomas Jameira (listed as Manager in source data)
service_types: special-needs / paratransit (per source flag); possible NEMT
districts_or_customers: None confirmed; Polk County area paratransit is dominated by Citrus Connection (the regional public transit authority)
recent_news: No news, contracts, or M&A signals located. The website 'allegiancetransportation.com' in source data actually belongs to a Minneapolis/St Paul, MN senior/NEMT operator -- NOT the Fort Meade, FL entity. Polk County FL NEMT/paratransit space is served primarily by Citrus Connection. No Florida Sunbiz hit was retrievable in this session.
fit_notes: Very small (~10 employees, ~$0.6M est. revenue), special-needs/NEMT-flagged (school=0 in source). Even if confirmed in Fort Meade, FL, this is sub-scale for a Summit tuck-in unless aggregated with other Polk County operators. Also unclear whether they hold any school district SPED contracts vs. pure Medicaid NEMT. Low priority absent confirmation of contracted SPED routes. Source's website attribution is incorrect -- not actually allegiancetransportation.com.
